cause: Main hydraulic pump rotational vibration exceeds standard tolerance (0.15 mm peak-to-peak). Typically caused by shaft misalignment, worn coupling insert, or pump mount bolt looseness.
solution:
1. Measure shaft alignment with laser tool.
2. Inspect coupling insert and replace if cracked.
3. Check mount bolts and torque to 145 Nm.

cause: Slewing ring turntable bearing radial wear exceeds limit (1.5 mm). Usually caused by fatigue, lubrication failure (dry races), or metal spalling.
solution:
1. Run grease sample analysis to inspect for metal chips.
2. Check radial clearance using dial gauge.
3. Perform SOP-MNT-R215-087 to replace bearings.

cause: Pump casing operating temperature exceeds threshold (355 K / 82°C). Caused by excessive friction due to bearing degradation, oil starvation, or high load.
solution:
1. Check hydraulic oil level and oil cooler fan operation.
2. Verify bearing wear status and shaft torque.
3. Stop operation if temperature continues to rise.
